Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Apr-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER SERGEEV's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement agreement and for award of attorney fees and costs of $1,230.00" is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
